forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost near the Barossa Valley. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, most likely in the early morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost near the Barossa Valley. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the west. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Sunny. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly near the eastern border. The chance of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Patches of morning frost in the west. The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower early this evening. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning frost in the north. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely later this evening. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Hawker in the morning. Slight chance of a shower north of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Mostly sunny. Patches of morning frost. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending easterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the south, most likely later tonight. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta early this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. The chance of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Leigh Creek in the morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog and frost south of Yunta in the morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
